title: A2UI All Components Catalog
description: Meta-catalog combining all basic and extended A2UI components

components.name: Column
components.description: Vertical flex container for child components

components.name: Row
components.description: Horizontal flex container for child components

components.name: Text
components.description: Text display with variant styling and data binding

components.name: Button
components.description: Clickable button with variant styling and action support

components.name: Image
components.description: Image display with canvas URL rewriting

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Tabbed container (top, bottom, or hidden tab bar)

components.name: Slider
components.description: Range slider input with filter binding

components.name: Badge
components.description: Inline status badge with variant styling

components.name: Table
components.description: Data table with sorting and formatting support

components.name: Stack
components.description: Stacked container for overlapping child components

components.name: Spacer
components.description: Flexible spacer that fills available space

components.name: ProgressBar
components.description: Progress bar with label and data binding support

components.name: Repeat
components.description: Data-driven repeater that renders a template for each row

components.name: Wrap
components.description: Flex-wrap container that flows children across multiple lines
